connectors.label: Codex
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM accepts controlled dry-run plan; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass; orchestration:check + lint/build when code changes
connectors.readinessEvidence: Get-Command resolves codex on PATH; discovery only.
connectors.missingReadiness: Controlled dry-run design, non-interactive JSON/auth-quota/timeout/no-UI evidence, and PM acceptance.
connectors.nextAction: Keep codex draft-only until the missing evidence exists and PM/user explicitly revises the machine gate.

connectors.label: Trae
connectors.acceptanceGate: Resolve a non-secret Models configuration; pass one separately authorized read-only stream-json smoke; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.readinessEvidence: trae-cli 0.120.40 resolves on PATH; headless print and structured output are available; one authorized smoke returned exit 0 plus a top-level Models error with no UI, workspace change, or process residue.
connectors.missingReadiness: A valid non-secret Models configuration, successful model response, authentication proof, and a separately authorized read-only stream-json smoke.
connectors.nextAction: Keep Trae draft/pending/disabled; do not execute again until Models configuration and a fresh explicit smoke authorization exist.

connectors.label: Qoder
connectors.acceptanceGate: Rejected until an independent headless Agent CLI or API provides captured structured output, timeout, and failure semantics
connectors.readinessEvidence: Static inspection found only a desktop CLI wrapper and UI chat subcommand; no Qoder prompt was executed.
connectors.missingReadiness: An independent headless Agent CLI or API with captured structured output, timeout control, authentication status, and failure semantics.
connectors.nextAction: Keep Qoder disabled/rejected and command-empty; reconsider only when a real headless interface is installed and separately reviewed.
